Pinyin data notice
==================
The local pinyin compatibility module in pinyin-local.mjs was generated from the
xpinyin database included with TeX Live: xpinyin-database.def.

xpinyin copyright notice from the source file:
Copyright (C) 2012-2022 by Qing Lee <sobenlee@gmail.com>
Distributed under the LaTeX Project Public License version 1.3c or later.
The database was created from Unihan_Readings.txt, Unicode 14.0.0.

This repository vendors only text pinyin data/code, not font files.
